channel.title: fitgreenmind TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from fitgreenmind

item.title: I love cheese… plant based cheese 🧀🤭 Find all recipes on my website fit-green-mind.com!🌱 Well tbh most store-bought cheese alternatives don’t taste good, so here are my 3 favorite homemade vegan cheese recipes: 🧀 vegan mozzarella (that melts and browns) 🧀
item.description: I love cheese… plant based cheese 🧀🤭 Find all recipes on my website fit-green-mind.com!🌱 Well tbh most store-bought cheese alternatives don’t taste good, so here are my 3 favorite homemade vegan cheese recipes: 🧀 vegan mozzarella (that melts and browns) 🧀

item.title: VIRAL CHEESECAKE HACK but dairy-free… 🍰🌱 I wanted to see if you can make the viral cheesecake vegan, so I used coconut yogurt for that same creamy effect aaaand yes: it tastes good (but not necessarily like a real cheesecake though)🤭. RECIPE (2 servings,
item.description: VIRAL CHEESECAKE HACK but dairy-free… 🍰🌱 I wanted to see if you can make the viral cheesecake vegan, so I used coconut yogurt for that same creamy effect aaaand yes: it tastes good (but not necessarily like a real cheesecake though)🤭. RECIPE (2 servings,

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) 2026 is the year of taking care of your body!🥰🫶 For inspiration and motivation check out @Gymondo an app all about fitness and feeling good! 😊 There you’ll find many healthy recipes AND many workouts for all fitness goals and levels (also my
item.description: (Werbung/Ad) 2026 is the year of taking care of your body!🥰🫶 For inspiration and motivation check out @Gymondo an app all about fitness and feeling good! 😊 There you’ll find many healthy recipes AND many workouts for all fitness goals and levels (also my

item.title: EGGPLANT KEBAB 🍆 🔥 Eggplant was my “hate-veggie” for a veryyy long time but it’s all about the right preparation! When made like this EVERYONE will love it…😌 RECIPE (6 skewers, 30min prep time): -2 eggplants Peel and cut in thin slices. Marinade: -4 Tbsp
item.description: EGGPLANT KEBAB 🍆 🔥 Eggplant was my “hate-veggie” for a veryyy long time but it’s all about the right preparation! When made like this EVERYONE will love it…😌 RECIPE (6 skewers, 30min prep time): -2 eggplants Peel and cut in thin slices. Marinade: -4 Tbsp

item.title: Tofu 101 🤓 Don’t like tofu? Maybeee you’re just using the wrong tofu for the wrong purpose…👀 Find all these recipes on my website fit-green-mind.com 🌱 Firm tofu: the Allrounder 🌮 Shredded tofu 🥢 glazed tofu Soft tofu: best for braising 🍲 braised tofu (dub
item.description: Tofu 101 🤓 Don’t like tofu? Maybeee you’re just using the wrong tofu for the wrong purpose…👀 Find all these recipes on my website fit-green-mind.com 🌱 Firm tofu: the Allrounder 🌮 Shredded tofu 🥢 glazed tofu Soft tofu: best for braising 🍲 braised tofu (dub

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) Ich war auf Mallorca mit der @ARD Mediathek für ein ganz besonderes Projekt… Ich hab die spanische Küche erforscht und versucht klassische Gerichte plant-based nachzukochen. Das hat mal mehr und mal weniger gut geklappt, was EIGENTLICH okay i
item.description: (Werbung/Ad) Ich war auf Mallorca mit der @ARD Mediathek für ein ganz besonderes Projekt… Ich hab die spanische Küche erforscht und versucht klassische Gerichte plant-based nachzukochen. Das hat mal mehr und mal weniger gut geklappt, was EIGENTLICH okay i

item.title: VEGAN LASAGNA 🌱 One of my favorite dishes of all time! 🥰 RECIPE (5 servings, 60min prep time): Sauce: -2 onions -2 carrots -2 stalks celery Finely chop and sautée in a few Tbsp oil Add to the pan and fry for 4-5mins -3 Tbsp tomato paste -2 Tbsp balsamic
item.description: VEGAN LASAGNA 🌱 One of my favorite dishes of all time! 🥰 RECIPE (5 servings, 60min prep time): Sauce: -2 onions -2 carrots -2 stalks celery Finely chop and sautée in a few Tbsp oil Add to the pan and fry for 4-5mins -3 Tbsp tomato paste -2 Tbsp balsamic

item.title: SOY IS BAD FOR YOU!🤠 Nooo, soy is healthy for you (if you don’t have an allergy), it’s not destroying the plant (at least not the soy HUMANS eat) and “just eat meat” is not and won’t ever be a real argument!🤗 For this recipe just search on fit-green-mind.
item.description: SOY IS BAD FOR YOU!🤠 Nooo, soy is healthy for you (if you don’t have an allergy), it’s not destroying the plant (at least not the soy HUMANS eat) and “just eat meat” is not and won’t ever be a real argument!🤗 For this recipe just search on fit-green-mind.

item.title: STICKY SESAME TOFU 💥 You don’t know what to cook with tofu… well this recipe is a good place to start with!😋 RECIPE (3 servings, 30min prep time): -400g firm tofu Tear into chunks. -2 Tbsp corn starch -salt to taste -1/2 Tbsp oil Toss and bake at 190C/360
item.description: STICKY SESAME TOFU 💥 You don’t know what to cook with tofu… well this recipe is a good place to start with!😋 RECIPE (3 servings, 30min prep time): -400g firm tofu Tear into chunks. -2 Tbsp corn starch -salt to taste -1/2 Tbsp oil Toss and bake at 190C/360

item.title: (Werbung) Ich koche für… @reneadler!🤯🥹 René ist ehemaliger Nationaltorhüter und eines meiner Kindheitsidole (ich wollte auch mal Profi werden, bin aber gaaanz knapp gescheitert 🫢). Also geht’s mit der @ARD Mediathek nach Mallorca, um René PERSÖNLICH zu b
item.description: (Werbung) Ich koche für… @reneadler!🤯🥹 René ist ehemaliger Nationaltorhüter und eines meiner Kindheitsidole (ich wollte auch mal Profi werden, bin aber gaaanz knapp gescheitert 🫢). Also geht’s mit der @ARD Mediathek nach Mallorca, um René PERSÖNLICH zu b

item.title: WONDERS, meals made in one dish🌯🍜 You wanna eat healthy but you have no time to cook? Then welcome to my new series which is all about meals made in one pot, pan or tray!😋 Full flavor, no effort, no mess! We go from Köfte over curry to pasta and much more
item.description: WONDERS, meals made in one dish🌯🍜 You wanna eat healthy but you have no time to cook? Then welcome to my new series which is all about meals made in one pot, pan or tray!😋 Full flavor, no effort, no mess! We go from Köfte over curry to pasta and much more

item.title: SHEET-PAN KEBAB wONEders ep. 1🥙 Need a quick and easy dinner? Then make this! 😌 This is the ultimate shortcut to delicious koftas ! 😋 RECIPE (3-4 servings, 30min prep time) Koftas: -360g smoked tofu or firm tofu, crumbled -2 tbsp tomato paste -1 tbsp soy
item.description: SHEET-PAN KEBAB wONEders ep. 1🥙 Need a quick and easy dinner? Then make this! 😌 This is the ultimate shortcut to delicious koftas ! 😋 RECIPE (3-4 servings, 30min prep time) Koftas: -360g smoked tofu or firm tofu, crumbled -2 tbsp tomato paste -1 tbsp soy

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) My favorite way to eat chickpeas: as cake! 🎂🌝 They’re quickly made and the time in the oven can be used for a @Gymondo a workout! 😊 There you’ll find many healthy recipes AND many workouts for all fitness goals and levels (also my own workou
item.description: (Werbung/Ad) My favorite way to eat chickpeas: as cake! 🎂🌝 They’re quickly made and the time in the oven can be used for a @Gymondo a workout! 😊 There you’ll find many healthy recipes AND many workouts for all fitness goals and levels (also my own workou

item.title: ONE PAN BIBIMBAP wONEders ep. 2🍚🌶️ Bibimbap (비빔밥) is a Korean classic and literally translates to “mixed rice”. Usually I’m too lazy to prep everything separately, so here’s my easy, single serve, one pan solution for you.😋 RECIPE (1 serving, 30min prep
item.description: ONE PAN BIBIMBAP wONEders ep. 2🍚🌶️ Bibimbap (비빔밥) is a Korean classic and literally translates to “mixed rice”. Usually I’m too lazy to prep everything separately, so here’s my easy, single serve, one pan solution for you.😋 RECIPE (1 serving, 30min prep

item.title: Please tell me I’m not the only one…🫣
item.description: Please tell me I’m not the only one…🫣

item.title: Also nicht alleine, sondern zusammen mit der @ARD Mediathek und dem @srdings ging’s nach Mallorca, um @reneadler von der plant-based Küche zu überzeugen… 👀 Dafür hab ich ein echtes Abenteuer auf der Insel erlebt und ab dem 11.03. könnt ihr in @ardmediath
item.description: Also nicht alleine, sondern zusammen mit der @ARD Mediathek und dem @srdings ging’s nach Mallorca, um @reneadler von der plant-based Küche zu überzeugen… 👀 Dafür hab ich ein echtes Abenteuer auf der Insel erlebt und ab dem 11.03. könnt ihr in @ardmediath

item.title: MARRY ME CHICKPEAS wONEders ep. 3🍲 If you’re still looking for a appropriate Valentine’s Day dinner… this one’s for you!😌 RECIPE (3-4 servings, 25min prep time): -1 onion -3 clove garlic Sauté in oil -1/2 jar (100g) sun dried tomatoes, chopped -1 can (22
item.description: MARRY ME CHICKPEAS wONEders ep. 3🍲 If you’re still looking for a appropriate Valentine’s Day dinner… this one’s for you!😌 RECIPE (3-4 servings, 25min prep time): -1 onion -3 clove garlic Sauté in oil -1/2 jar (100g) sun dried tomatoes, chopped -1 can (22

item.title: I think I can sell my oven now haha ‘cause making granola in your air fryer a game changer! 🤭 RECIPE (1 batch, 2in prep time): -1 1/2 cup (150g) oats -1/2 cup (75g) nuts of your choice -cinnamon to taste -a pinch of salt -1/4 cup (60ml) agave or maple s
item.description: I think I can sell my oven now haha ‘cause making granola in your air fryer a game changer! 🤭 RECIPE (1 batch, 2in prep time): -1 1/2 cup (150g) oats -1/2 cup (75g) nuts of your choice -cinnamon to taste -a pinch of salt -1/4 cup (60ml) agave or maple s

item.title: Plot twist: there’s no him, I’m just addicted to rice paper dumplings…🤭🥟 RECIPE (1 serving, 20min prep time): -1 carrot, shredded -a piece of ginger, chopped -a handful cilantro, chopped -100g tofu, crumbled -2 Tsp soy sauce -2 Tsp white wine vineg

item.title: Always believe in yourself like I believed in my first sourdough!🥹🫶 #bread #breadtok #sourdoughbread
item.description: Always believe in yourself like I believed in my first sourdough!🥹🫶 #bread #breadtok #sourdoughbread

item.title: FIESTA POTATOES wONEders ep.4🥔🌶️ All you need is one tray to make this super easy yet super delicious dish! 😋 RECIPE (2 servings, 45min prep time): -400g potatoes, cut in small chunks -1 block (200g) tofu, shredded -2 bell pepper, chopped -1 purple onion
item.description: FIESTA POTATOES wONEders ep.4🥔🌶️ All you need is one tray to make this super easy yet super delicious dish! 😋 RECIPE (2 servings, 45min prep time): -400g potatoes, cut in small chunks -1 block (200g) tofu, shredded -2 bell pepper, chopped -1 purple onion

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) STULLEN AROUND THE WORLD 🗺️ 🥪 pt. 2: peri peri Sandwich Ich wurde mit meinem Stullengewürz von @sebastiancopien nach Portugal geschickt… und ich finde das Ergebnis kann sich sehen lassen!🤭 Hier ist das Rezept und falls ihr wissen wollt wohin
item.description: (Werbung/Ad) STULLEN AROUND THE WORLD 🗺️ 🥪 pt. 2: peri peri Sandwich Ich wurde mit meinem Stullengewürz von @sebastiancopien nach Portugal geschickt… und ich finde das Ergebnis kann sich sehen lassen!🤭 Hier ist das Rezept und falls ihr wissen wollt wohin

item.title: The fact I’ve recorded the first video EXACTLY one year ago ago makes me emotional… I struggled with severe health issues, my days looked like this: getting up, feeling sick, laying on the couch, going to bed and I thought it’d never get any better. Fast
item.description: The fact I’ve recorded the first video EXACTLY one year ago ago makes me emotional… I struggled with severe health issues, my days looked like this: getting up, feeling sick, laying on the couch, going to bed and I thought it’d never get any better. Fast

item.title: TOFU CHOCOLATE CAKE HACK 🍰 If you didn’t know silken tofu is GREAT to prepare any kind of cake mix… now you do and you should definitely try! 😋 (So basicallyyyy this is a 3 ingredient cake recipe 🤭). RECIPE (1 cake, 60min prep time): -1 boxed cake mix (m
item.description: TOFU CHOCOLATE CAKE HACK 🍰 If you didn’t know silken tofu is GREAT to prepare any kind of cake mix… now you do and you should definitely try! 😋 (So basicallyyyy this is a 3 ingredient cake recipe 🤭). RECIPE (1 cake, 60min prep time): -1 boxed cake mix (m

item.title: MUSHROOM SHAWARMA 🥙 wONEders ep. 5 This is the easiest way to enjoy a delicious shawarma, just throw everything on one tray, then bake and roll in a wrap! 😋 RECIPE (2 servings, 35min prep time): -350g king oyster mushrooms -1 Tbsp lemon juice -2 Tsp agav
item.description: MUSHROOM SHAWARMA 🥙 wONEders ep. 5 This is the easiest way to enjoy a delicious shawarma, just throw everything on one tray, then bake and roll in a wrap! 😋 RECIPE (2 servings, 35min prep time): -350g king oyster mushrooms -1 Tbsp lemon juice -2 Tsp agav

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) I’ve eaten a steak… a @Planted. steak! 🤭 I got the chance to visit the @eatplanted factory in Switzerland and try a bunch of their products, it’s crazy to see how they turn clean ingredients into something that LOOKS, FEELS and TASTES like me
item.description: (Werbung/Ad) I’ve eaten a steak… a @Planted. steak! 🤭 I got the chance to visit the @eatplanted factory in Switzerland and try a bunch of their products, it’s crazy to see how they turn clean ingredients into something that LOOKS, FEELS and TASTES like me

item.title: (Werbung) Schick das jemanden, der denkt „plant-based“ schmeckt nicht! 🤭 Zusammen mit der @ardmediathek und dem @srdings war ich in Mallorca, um @reneadler von der plant-based Küche zu überzeugen, indem ich seine Lieblings-Tapas ganz ohne tierische Produk
item.description: (Werbung) Schick das jemanden, der denkt „plant-based“ schmeckt nicht! 🤭 Zusammen mit der @ardmediathek und dem @srdings war ich in Mallorca, um @reneadler von der plant-based Küche zu überzeugen, indem ich seine Lieblings-Tapas ganz ohne tierische Produk

item.title: SEXY CABBGE 🥬 wONEders ep. 6 Aka charred cabbage on coconut-chickpeas… made in no time but I Tell um you this tastes like a 5 star meal! 😋 RECIPE (4 servings, 30min prep time): -1 pointed cabbage, cut in wedges Heat up oil in a pan and char the cabbage o
item.description: SEXY CABBGE 🥬 wONEders ep. 6 Aka charred cabbage on coconut-chickpeas… made in no time but I Tell um you this tastes like a 5 star meal! 😋 RECIPE (4 servings, 30min prep time): -1 pointed cabbage, cut in wedges Heat up oil in a pan and char the cabbage o

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) Vegan Kayseri yağlaması 🇹🇷 wONEders ep.7 I LOVE this Turkish dish and it’s even better with my @soul-spice.com Stullenfreu(n)d (CODE: fitgreenmind)!☺️ RECIPE (3 servings, 30min prep time): -1 onion -2 cloves garlic -1 red pepper Chop every
item.description: (Werbung/Ad) Vegan Kayseri yağlaması 🇹🇷 wONEders ep.7 I LOVE this Turkish dish and it’s even better with my @soul-spice.com Stullenfreu(n)d (CODE: fitgreenmind)!☺️ RECIPE (3 servings, 30min prep time): -1 onion -2 cloves garlic -1 red pepper Chop every
